Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories To Form Interrogatories To Pltf Nader Saborouh, Set One; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is GRANTED. Plaintiff is ordered to serve a response by January 12, 2006. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $861.30 are to be paid on or before January 31, 2006. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
